entry.title: Three Is Greater Than Two
entry.summary:
Author: parkerwritesfic

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,748Chapters: 5/6Kudos: 48

Summary: Dick didn’t want Tim to get the wrong idea, that his being with Jason meant that Dick and Tim couldn’t also happen. He needed to dispel that notion fast. He needed to show Tim how much he liked him, how much he wanted, needed him.Dick and Jason are secretly fucking. Each of them, in turn, starts seeing Tim, too, who has known all along, and all three end up on a collision course headed towards the bedroom.

entry.title: Did You Give My Dog Chicken?!
entry.summary:
Author: Wing1940

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,096Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 29

Summary: Richard Grayson pioneered the whole "defying the Big B" thing — first as Nightwing, then as Detective Grayson of the GCPD. Then the Red Hood fell on his head (literally), and now they're stuck playing some damn cat-and-mouse game.

entry.title: Catch and Release
entry.summary:
Author: soaring_bubblegum

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,099Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 41

Summary: Dick landed in a crouch, escrima sticks spinning to a stop in his hands. "Three against one? Come on, Hood. Even the worst Vegas odds would call that overkill."Red Hood tilted his helmet. The lenses glowed white in the darkness, expressionless and cold. "Nightwing. Heard you'd moved to Blüdhaven. Slumming tonight?"Dick raised an eyebrow beneath his mask. "Didn't your mother ever teach you to use your words, not your weapons? Come on, let them go. GCPD will take care of it."DickJay Week 2026 - Day 4 - Identity Porn

entry.title: Please Come Home
entry.summary:
Author: Nobyl

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,208Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 18

Summary: He really should have told Dick, he knew he should have. Dick never did anything wrong, in fact he was probably the best person in Jason’s life before he was murdered. So he wasn’t sure why he didn’t tell Dick when he came back to Gotham, cowardice probably. But he had bigger things to worry about, this god damn gunshot wound being the main issue. Written for DickJay week 2026 day 4: Identity Porn (no actual porn sorry) and Rescue

entry.title: Brother Come Home
entry.summary:
Author: sarriathmg

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,558Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 47

Summary: The event that led to Dick finding Jason was a phone call between Li, Black Mask’s right-hand man, and a bum from Gotham called Thomas Carbone, who had a story to tell that would “most certainly interest” Sionis. The bum talked about “the boy” that he found in the back alley. He talked about how he didn’t speak and looked numbly at everything, said how he slept on a piece of newspaper. “I knew the kid’s moves. Had a drug run with a boss a while ago. He’d kicked my ass just as he did old Al’s, I tell you. There’s no mistaking it. I know who the kid is… and I think you’d be interested. I think that kid is Robin." ...Dick finds Jason during his catatonic era. Dickjay Week 2026 Day 4: Amnesiac/Catatonic Jason + Rescue

entry.title: How to tame your fox
entry.summary:
Author: Kyraliah

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,455Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 43

Summary: The truth is, that no one really can say why some humans start to express animalistic traits at some point while growing up. Some call it evolution, some call it mutation, but no one could pinpoint so far where it comes from. And even at a time that has not only Superman, Aliens and other meta powered individuals around, governments rallied fast enough and took a lot of rights from these hybrids. Out of fear officially. To control them unofficially. One of the most impactful being that they need to have a guardian. Which obviously got translated very fast into ownership by the rich. Jason is one of those hybrids. ******************************** DickJay Week 2026 Chapter 1 (Day 3): Animal Hybrids/Features (T rated) Chapter 2 (Day 4): I am doing it probably wrong, since I can't help myself. Chapter two will be continuing the story with a prompt from Day 4.

entry.title: Mission: Get Dick Pregnant
entry.summary:
Author: rhaellu

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,679Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 35

Summary: Dick gets shot during a mission and a doctors tells Bruce he's had a miscarriage. This is 2 months after the sex pollen thing but Dick didn't know about it.Bruce is feeling guilty for everything that's happened, and when Dick feels better and goes back home, they all have A Very Important Talk.Turns out, after a lot of thinking, Dick wants to try to get pregnant... this time intentionally. And he wants Bruce to reverse his vasectomy!How will this affect their lives? How will their friends and other heroes act when it's known a few intimate details about their whole relationship?

entry.title: Consanguinity
entry.summary:
Author: soaring_bubblegum

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,199Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 116

Summary: Sometimes Dick thought that the moment Bruce had first introduced Jason—scrawny, defiant, drowning in the green and red and yellow of Dick's old Robin suit—something had short-circuited behind his eyes. Rewired the whole goddamn motherboard. Because he remembered standing in the Cave, twenty years old and furious at Bruce for replacing him, and then this kid had turned around, and the pixie boots were too big and the cape pooled on the floor like a puddle of gold, and Dick's anger had evaporated into something he didn't have vocabulary for.DickJay Week 2026 - Day 3 - Incest Kink

entry.title: The Royal Court of Gotham, Welcomes You (not)
entry.summary:
Author: Abraxax

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,445Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 59

Summary: DickJay Week 2026 (Day 3)Fairytale Retelling | Animal Hybrid/Features | Incest Kink | Escaping Arranged Marriage Before she even sent that outrageous letter, someone should have told Princess Amelie that Margrave Jason Todd was, in fact, not some sort of black sheep to the Royal Family or a hidden bastard son, but the beloved son of King Bruce Wayne, and the Second Prince of the Kingdom of Gotham, who had explicitly requested the position of Margrave, and not, as she believes, been exhiled to it. Someone should have also warned Princess Amelie on the Royal Court's open secret that the charming and handsome First Prince Richard Wayne was intensively looking to marry said Margrave, come hell or high water. If anything, someone should have definitely warned Princess Amelie and her Lady in waiting to stay away from any mentions of pure bloodlines anywhere near Dick, and definitely refrain from insulting Jason in front of him.

entry.title: This Kind Of Lux Just Ain’t For Us, We Crave A Different Type Of Lust
entry.summary:
Author: nursal1060

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,760Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 38

Summary: Jason finds out on the eve of his 18th birthday that he’s been betrothed without his knowledge to a neighboring kingdom’s ruler to build an alliance. The man is known to be cruel and violent - not to mention his more than twice Jason’s age. The wedding is set for tomorrow evening, with the marriage contracts having been drafted already.The only way that Jason can break the marriage pact is by bedding another royal - however, most royals fear Jason’s lineage. However, Jason does trust one person to bed him properly - and luckily for both of them, Dick doesn’t care about breaking rules. DickJay Week: Escaping An Arranged Marriage AND Incest Kink
